tools.name: ailey-seo-report
tools.description: Generate comprehensive SEO analysis reports with ratings, recommendations, and interactive visualizations
tools.modelDescription: Analyze websites for SEO performance including technical SEO, content quality, performance metrics, and Core Web Vitals. Crawls websites, analyzes on-page elements, generates scoring reports, and produces interactive HTML reports, Markdown summaries, JSON data exports, and CSV recommendation lists. Use for website audits, SEO optimization, performance analysis, and technical SEO assessments.

crawlDepth.description: Maximum crawl depth for multi-page analysis

includeMetrics.description: SEO metrics to include in analysis
